questionHtml: Sickle cell anemia is due to a single base substitution in DNA. Using the diagram, outline how this translates into the production of an abnormal hemoglobin molecule by completing the spaces labelled I, II and III.
markschemeHtml:
a. I: GUG
AND
II: CAC 

b. III: Val/valine

Both required. Do not accept GAG to GTC.
